title: Flows boost
hypothesis: If we add an in-line recommendation to add an email to eligible, existing Abandoned Cart flows, users will click it, and follow-through with the action.
results:
• No stat sig impact to 7D flow publish rate

  • Relatively low discovery (4.5% CTA click rate) and adoption (2.35% added recommendation to flow rate) 

  • Stat sig  +2.2% increase in % of accounts adding an email to an existing flow in 7D 

    • Driven by Entrepreneur accounts with a small profile base
      (< 2500 profiles)

    • Despite low adoption rate of Boost recommendation, feature seems to drive accounts to add email to other flow types too (Confirmation, Welcome Series, VIP Loyalty)

  • No stat sig harm to 7D flow spam and unsubscribe rate
notes:
Eligibility Criteria

  • ≥ 4 flows (live or draft)

  • Flow is an Abandoned Cart flow that generated revenue in the last 30 days

  • < 0.3% unsubscribe rate in the last 30 days

  • Flow is a single branch with < 3 emails

  • Flow has no splits
